data.title: Since January 2021, the supply of stablecoins on the Ethereum mainnet has increased more than 5 times to $123 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official DefiLlama on the X platform, in January 2021, the supply of stablecoins on the ETH mainnet was only $22 billion; in comparison, this figure has now grown to $123 billion. In addition, the chart information shows that the price of ETH has fallen by nearly two-thirds compared to its 2021 high.

data.title: Ethereum Stablecoin Supply Surges to $123 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, the stablecoin supply on the Ethereum mainnet has seen significant growth since January 2021. At that time, the supply was $22 billion, but it has now increased to $123 billion. Despite this growth in stablecoin supply, Ethereum's price has dropped by nearly two-thirds from its peak in 2021.

data.title: Abstract Chain Reaches Over 1.16 Million Addresses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Dune indicates that the Layer 2 network Abstract Chain, designed for on-chain culture and community, has reached 1,161,393 addresses. The network's DeFi protocol total value locked (TVL) stands at $14.97 million.

data.title: Backpack Exchange Season 1 Points Event has been launched for three weeks, setting many new records
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to data disclosed by Backpack officials, three weeks after the Backpack Points event was launched, multiple data hit new highs:
- 24-hour contract trading volume reached US$950 million, setting a new record, an increase of 280% compared to the single-day data at the beginning of the event
-Contract holdings hit a new high of US$113 million
-More than 46,000 active trading users in the third week
-The total spot and contract trading volume in the first season reached US$4.1 billion

data.title: BitMart's market report for April 11 shows that BTC's intraday volatility has increased, and it is obviously affected by the macro level.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on April 11, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 2.56 trillion US dollars, down 1.1% from the previous day. BTC's intraday volatility has increased, and it is obviously affected by the macro level. In addition, the BTC ETF has had a net outflow for six consecutive days; ETH follows the market ups and downs, but the increase is significantly weaker than BTC, and ETH/BTC has fallen again to around 0.0192; the comprehensive long-short ratio is 1.07, and the long forces are at a 24-hour high; altcoins generally fell, and the market lacks collective narrative hotspots;

data.title: Analyst Recommends DCA Strategy for Altcoins Amid Buying Opportunity
data.description: According to PANews, CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost has advised investors to consider implementing a dollar-cost averaging (DCA) strategy for altcoins. He highlighted that the market has entered a buying zone, characterized by the 30-day moving average trading volume falling below the annual average. The last occurrence of this scenario was in September 2023, following the end of a bear market. Such phases can last for several weeks or even months and have historically provided a favorable opportunity for setting up a DCA strategy.

data.title: World Liberty Denies Selling ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News World Liberty Financial (WLFI) denied reports of selling ETH earlier this week. It was previously reported that a wallet address associated with WLFI (marked by Arkham) sold about $8 million worth of ETH when ETH fell to $1,465. In response, a WLFI spokesperson said: "The claim that WLFI sold its holdings is completely untrue. No assets have been sold at present, and the relevant speculation is wrong." (CoinDesk)

data.title: World Liberty Financial Denies Reports of ETH Sale
data.description: According to Odaily, World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has refuted recent reports suggesting it sold Ethereum (ETH) earlier this week. Previous reports indicated that a wallet address linked to WLFI, marked by Arkham, sold approximately $8 million worth of ETH when its price dropped to $1,465. A spokesperson for WLFI stated, "The claims regarding WLFI selling its holdings are completely false. No assets have been sold, and the related speculation is incorrect."

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Proposes Roadmap to Boost Ethereum User Privacy
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed a path aimed at significantly improving privacy for Ethereum users.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/vitalik-buterin-proposes-roadmap-to-boost-ethereum-user-privacy/

data.title: Coinbase CLO Slams FDIC for 'Absurd' Delays in Crypto Debanking Records Lawsuit
data.description:
Coinbase opposed FDIC’s request for a 16-day delay in a FOIA case, calling the agency’s stall tactics “legally incorrect. ”
source: https://decrypt.co/314477/coinbase-slams-fdic-absurd-delays-crypto-debanking-records-lawsuit
